response.justification: Strong full-stack engineer with 19 years of experience and demonstrated innovation through open source projects and leadership in workshops, but lacks the specific depth in AI/ML product development and strategic customer advisory experience required for a Principal-level AI strategy role. Recent move to AI-agent infrastructure is promising directionally, but the portfolio focuses on infrastructure/tooling rather than delivered AI products or platforms that solve business problems.
strengths: 19 years of broad technical experience across full-stack engineering, systems, and infrastructure domains with demonstrated ability to architect complex solutions
Strong innovation and communication track record through founding GISCollective (2016–present), creating public workshops, and speaking at international conferences
Currently building AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling at re:cinq, showing active engagement in modern AI/ML workflows
concerns: No demonstrated portfolio of AI/ML products or platforms—current work is infrastructure-focused rather than AI product delivery
Limited strategic and customer advisory experience; career path shows individual contributor progression (Staff level) rather than director-level strategic leadership
Missing advanced degree in AI/ML-related field; lacks recognized expertise in AI strategy, cloud platform vision, or enterprise technology adoption

key_factors.factor: Technical breadth and innovation track record
Strategic leadership and customer advisory experience gap
